StepAction: Gateway splice loop serving authenticated clients 到 依-使用者 daemon 於 steady 狀態
Condition: restartself MCP 工具 invoked 由 AI

StepAction: Daemon 路由 /api/v2/全域/web/restart receives JWT-authenticated POST 使用 targets 與 reason
解析restartruntimemode classifies runtime 作為 Gateway-daemon 或 legacy
Condition: 是Gatewaydaemon true 與 targets includes Gateway
是Gatewaydaemon true 與 targets excludes Gateway
legacy mode 開發-來源 開發-standalone 或 service

StepAction: Branch dispatched: Gateway-目標 compileGateway供self更新, daemon/前端-目標 啟動 webctl.sh restart --graceful 使用 OPENCODE RESTART TXID, legacy 啟動 webctl.sh restart --graceful
Condition: worker spawned 使用 OPENCODE RESTART ERROR LOG FILE set

StepAction: webctl.sh dorestart fingerprints daemon 來源, 前端 Bundle, 與 Gateway C binary against installed artifacts
Rebuild 與 install 僅 dirty layers 透過 do建置binary, do建置前端, docompileGateway
worker exits zero, 路由 handler responds 200 使用 mode=controlledrestart 與 recoveryDeadlineMs=30000
Condition: targets included Gateway 與 self更新.執行actions succeeded

StepAction: Daemon 路徑: setTimeout 300ms, then Daemon.removeDiscovery unlinks daemon.js在 daemon.pid daemon.sock 與 process.exit(0)
Gateway 路徑: schedule restart-service opencode-gateway.service after 300ms, systemd respawns Gateway binary causing 3-5s downtime 供 all users
Condition: systemd reports opencode-Gateway active 執行中

StepAction: 下一個 authenticated 請求 hits Gateway find或createdaemon 與 detects stale daemon.js在 或 缺失 socket
Self-heal escalation: read daemon.lock JSON, validate /程序/<pid> uid 比對, SIGTERM, 1s waitpid, SIGKILL, unlink socket 路徑
Condition: orphan-cleanup 結果 exited 或 killed logged

StepAction: Gateway re-creates /執行/使用者/<uid>/opencode mode 0700, parses OPENCODE BIN argv, fork+setsid+initgroups+setgid+setuid+execvp daemon
New daemon 伺服器.listenUnix binds socket 與 writes daemon.js在 daemon.pid 透過 Daemon.writeDiscovery
Condition: /api/v2/全域/健康 探測 返回 200

StepAction: Gateway resumes splice proxy 到 fresh daemon, client SSE reconnect absorbs 503 window, system 回到 到 steady 狀態
建置 failure 路徑: 路由 handler 返回 WEB RESTART FAILED 使用 webctlExit, txid, 錯誤記錄路徑, 或 RESTART LOCK BUSY 409 if stderr matches already 在 progress; previous daemon version keeps 執行中
Condition: AI reads 錯誤記錄路徑, fixes 來源, re-invokes restartself
